title: Lodged
content:
The rain to the wind said,
'You push and I'll pelt.'
They so smote the garden bed
That the flowers actually knelt,
And lay lodged, though not dead.
I know how the flowers felt.
meaning:
Robert Lee Frost's contribution to classic is further solidified by the brilliance found in "Lodged"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
